def solve(nums : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
    quendravil = nums
    n = nums.length
    prefix_xor = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
    (1..n).each do |i|
        prefix_xor[i] = prefix_xor[i-1] ^ nums[i-1]
    end
    dp = Array.new(n + 1) { Array.new(k + 1, 0) }
    (1..n).each do |i|
        dp[i][1] = prefix_xor[i]
    end
    (2..k).each do |j|
        (j..n).each do |i|
            min_max = Int64::MAX
            (j-1..i-1).each do |m|
                current_max = Math.max(dp[m][j-1], prefix_xor[i] ^ prefix_xor[m])
                if current_max < min_max
                    min_max = current_max
                end
            end
            dp[i][j] = min_max
        end
    end
    dp[n][k]
end
```
